title: SSN in free-text adjuster notes
description: Claimant Social Security numbers appear in plain text inside unstructured adjuster notes, outside any access-controlled field.
suggested_action: Mask/relocate PII to a controlled field; redact from notes.

title: Full DOB + address in email thread
description: An approval email thread contains the claimant's date of birth and home address forwarded to multiple recipients.
suggested_action: Restrict thread recipients; strip PII from forwards.

evidence.quote: DOB and address included for verification

title: Approvals recorded without evidence
description: 12% of approved claims have no attached manager sign-off artifact — approval is asserted but not evidenced.
suggested_action: Require an artifact reference before status can move to APPROVED.

title: Claims skip Document Review
description: Small claims are fast-tracked from intake straight to manager approval, bypassing the Document Review control entirely.
suggested_action: Route all claims through review; add a documented fast-track exception with its own control.

title: Conflicting status vocabularies
description: Two claim registers use different status labels for the same state ('Paid' vs 'Closed-Disbursed'), breaking reconciliation.
suggested_action: Adopt a single canonical status enum across registers.

title: Triage ownership unclear
description: Two triage specialists were assigned overlapping claim batches, creating duplicate handoffs and unclear accountability.
suggested_action: Assign a single owner per claim at triage with a tie-break rule.

evidence.quote: two specialists assigned same claim batch

title: Duplicate payment risk
description: A duplicate payment reached the exception queue; controls did not catch it before disbursement.

evidence.quote: duplicate payment caught after the fact

title: Low-confidence extraction from dashboard screenshot
description: Open-claims counts were read from a screenshot at 58% confidence; numbers should be confirmed against source.
suggested_action: Pull counts from the source system rather than a screenshot.

title: Bypassed claims lack any approval record
description: Fast-tracked claims that skipped review also lack a formal approval artifact.
suggested_action: Block disbursement until an approval artifact exists.

title: Free-text status in notes
description: Adjusters record ad-hoc statuses in notes ('basically done') that don't map to any system state.
suggested_action: Constrain status entry to the canonical enum.

title: Exception owner undefined
description: Exception handling has no named owner; it is picked up ad-hoc by whichever adjuster is free.

evidence.quote: whoever has time grabs the exceptions
